title: Make groups dynamic (like they already are in timeline view)
excerpt: Currently groups are static. To me that doesn’t make sense since pretty much everything else about your views are dynamic. In fact, you’ve already started to make groups dynamic on timeline views, as you can simply chang…

posts.author: joshua.davison (Josh Davison)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently groups are static. To me that doesn’t make sense since pretty much everything else about your views are dynamic. In fact, you’ve already started to make groups dynamic on timeline views, as you can simply change how content is grouped by selecting a column to group by in the view settings - so why do they have to be static on table and other views?

I would like to be able to select a column and automatically group items by that column in the table view and the kanban view, like you already can on timeline views.

posts.author: TheOtherPM (Paul McGregor)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be amazing. Airtable does this really effectively.

posts.author: kevin.delahunt (Kevin Delahunt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi

We’re working on bringing two different teams together 3-4 dozen people. I also do not understand why column groups are the only static element. We’re trying to use Monday to help organize hundreds of granular tasks at the same time as provide an overview.

Column groups are so useful in organizing your tasks as they automatically organize and provide context for your task when filtering. And you already have a sorting feature. But all it does is reorders the tasks within a column. Instead, the sorting feature could update the task groupings themselves.

I did some more research and found an app that might help:

1View - Make your Dream View in monday to manage, update and track everything at one single place. Share your monday apps!
[1View (3)] Hi all, I’m Thusitha Manathunga and I created 1View for monday Apps Challenge: Dream it, build it. 1View is a monday app that allows users to see and update everything at one single place. Anyone can easily add 1View to their dashboards and board views within just few seconds. How it works? Watch demo Getting Started Add 1View to your dashboard What it does? As the name suggests, 1View is a monday app that allows users to see and update everything at one single place. 1View…

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@joshua.davison

This is now available!

Group by Column (A.K.A. "Board Group by", "Dynamic Grouping", "Virtual Groups") Special workflows & use cases
I don’t normally post here when a add a video to the Monday Man YouTube channel. But, on this one, I thought most monday users will find this interesting. posts.author: AprilGuinn (April Guinn)
posts.cookedHtml: So this appears to have been disabled for re-design… and news on when it might be back?

posts.author: Arno_M (Arnaud)
posts.cookedHtml: Functionalities with a Beta status should not be considered as available…

posts.author: joshua.davison (Josh Davison)
posts.cookedHtml: At the time Jim messaged, ‘group by’ was fully released. Unfortunately Monday reversed the release a short while later due to some issues (performance based issues if I recall correctly).

posts.author: Arno_M (Arnaud)
posts.cookedHtml: I may be wrong but, in Jim’s video, the feature is only available in “monday.labs”, with status “Alpha” (even lower than Beta)…

posts.author: joshua.davison (Josh Davison)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hmm, that could just mean Jim filmed the demo before it was publicly released, but also possible I’ve mis-remembered how it played out - perhaps it was just added to Monday.labs, then only a few weeks later removed from Monday.labs. I don’t entirely remember.

Either way, I really miss this feature.

posts.author: torrie (Torrie)
posts.cookedHtml: Absolutely need this! Will this function be coming back??
